message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

participant "bibliotecario" as bibliotecario1 #LightBlue2
boundary InterfazBiblioteca as interfaz1 #WhiteSmoke
box Api #lightblue participant api1 #white :Api end box
database Mongo as mongo1 #WhiteSmoke


' First interaction block - top to bottom flow
== Eliminar Recurso ==

note over bibliotecario1,interfaz1: 1 Peticion para eliminar recurso 
bibliotecario1 ->> interfaz1 

note right of interfaz1: 2 Redirecciona peticion a api  
interfaz1 --> api1  

api1 ..>> mongo1:3 consulta recurso y lo elimina   

mongo1 --<< api1:4 Envia mensaje HTTP de aceptacion o error    

api1 <-- interfaz1:5 Envía Mensaje     

interface BibliotecariaInterf { }    
link interfacelinkedwiththisone() <<Interface>> {}     
return message received by user from system via this link between them both entities involved here now!    



@enduml
